objective: Smoke the deployed Today day-review archive workflow on both public production aliases after git push and approved Vercel production deployment.

lifeMaxOmegaAutoDeployment.note: life-max-omega was updated by the git-linked production deployment after pushing main.

smoke.label: lifemax-web
flow: Reset browser-local state through /profile.
Open /today, save check-in, and generate a browser-local plan.
Open /capture and save a helped habit capture.
Return to /today and save the evening close.
Verify Local day review ready on Today.
Save review checkpoint from Today and verify the browser-local status.
Save to history from Today and verify 1 archived local day.
Refresh /today and verify the archived count persists.
Open /patterns and verify Local day history shows 1 local day archived.
Verify mobile scrollWidth equals clientWidth.

smoke.label: life-max-omega
flow: Reset browser-local state through /profile.
Open /today, save check-in, and generate a browser-local plan.
Open /capture and save a helped habit capture.
Return to /today and save the evening close.
Verify Local day review ready on Today.
Save review checkpoint from Today and verify the browser-local status.
Save to history from Today and verify 1 archived local day.
Refresh /today and verify the archived count persists.
Open /patterns and verify Local day history shows 1 local day archived.
Verify mobile scrollWidth equals clientWidth.

truthBoundary: Production smoke proves browser-local demo behavior only.
No backend, account, WHOOP, AI, Telegram, n8n, Postgres, public MCP, reminder, timer, or cross-device sync readiness is claimed.
